title: kb.session.harvest v1
description: Emitted (best-effort, never fails the command) by `kb harvest` after a session transcript has been distilled and written to the vault as a new entry. Source: kb/src/commands/harvest.rs.

session_id.description: Claude Code session id the transcript was harvested from.

project.description: Project the harvested entry is filed under.

entry_id.description: Vault entry id assigned to the harvested content.

path.description: Absolute path to the written vault markdown file.

content_hash.description: Content hash of the harvested body, used for dedup detection downstream.
